task_completion.description: Locate the db_config.php file for the acmecorp.test virtual server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, text editor, or terminal showing the path /home/acmecorp/public_html/includes/db_config.php or public_html/includes/db_config.php.

task_completion.description: Set the permissions of db_config.php to 644.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., chmod 644), file properties dialog, or file manager view showing the permissions of db_config.php changed to 644 or rw-r--r--.

task_completion.description: Update the database password in db_config.php to GymAnything123!.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of db_config.php with the password field explicitly set to 'GymAnything123!'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the System Status page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser with the address bar showing http://acmecorp.test/status.php.

task_completion.description: Verify the status page displays 'System Operational'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displaying the text 'System Operational' on the loaded status page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the actual configuration file on the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine interaction with a terminal (e.g., nano, vim, chmod) or a legitimate file manager/editor, rather than a mock text file or unrelated notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent tested the actual URL in a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show http://acmecorp.test/status.php, not a local file path (file://) or a different domain.

integrity.description: Verify the success message was not spoofed using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open and actively modifying the DOM to display 'System Operational'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target File: /home/acmecorp/public_html/includes/db_config.php. Expected Permissions: 644 (rw-r--r--). Expected Password: GymAnything123!. Target URL: http://acmecorp.test/status.php. Success String: 'System Operational'.
